MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Continued To Apr-01-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Francisco Torres, Esq. represented Caritas Management Corporation and there being no appearance by Defendant, Phyllis English, the matter is removed from settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and trial date is confirmed.
